seoTitle: Mount Aquila vs Mount Austin — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Mount Aquila and Mount Austin. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Mount Aquila vs Mount Austin: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Mount Aquila and Mount Austin.
heading: Mount Aquila vs Mount Austin — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Mount Aquila, New South Wales and Mount Austin, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Mount Austin has a lower overall climate risk score (34/100) compared to Mount Aquila (39/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Mount Aquila or Mount Austin safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Mount Aquila has a flood risk score of 33/100, while Mount Austin scores 27/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Mount Aquila scores 59/100 for bushfire risk. Mount Austin scores 48/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Mount Aquila or Mount Austin?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Mount Austin has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.3% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
